title: Threat intelligence match for url
summary: The executive review URL is tagged malicious by multiple staged threat feeds.
recommendation: Block the URL immediately and investigate any related user interaction.

title: GitHub token pattern detected
summary: A staging integration token appears in a locally synced project notebook.
recommendation: Revoke the exposed token and replace it with a managed secret reference.

title: Identity exposure detected in breach intelligence
summary: finance.ops@example.com appears in staged breach collections with password-reuse risk.
recommendation: Reset the account password, enforce MFA, and review recent sign-in activity.

title: Reply-To mismatch detected in email headers
summary: A staged executive escalation email redirects replies to an external mailbox.
recommendation: Quarantine the message and warn the target team not to reply.

title: Disabled browser protection setting detected
summary: Safe browsing protections are disabled in the default analyst browser profile.
recommendation: Re-enable browser protections and review the profile for unauthorized changes.
